metadata.title: Turning a Surprise Flank Into a Quick Double Kill in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Check out this clutch flank play that turned the round around. Timing and calm aim made all the difference here. How do you like to catch opponents off guard?

Tell me your best flank moment in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #fps
